rationale: The citing article is an editorial “looking forward” perspective (not an empirical/methods study) and its note says prior studies are used illustratively rather than for method implementation. The cited 2001 paper is a specific formative-index construction methodology, and there is no provided in-text context beyond a bare DOI match indicating substantive use. This looks like an incidental/background mention rather than a relation needing full dual-PDF judgment.
